name: FODE_RUNTIME
startup_context: CIS only. Strict release discipline. Canonical URL rules apply.
notes: Office canonical path replaces prior mixed baseline references.

name: CODEX_FORMS
startup_context: Forms workspace. Do not overwrite templates. Prefer field fill over overlay.

name: DHERST_Audit_Review
startup_context: DHERST audit mode. Controlled edits only when instructed.

name: ZOHO_CRM
startup_context: Zoho CRM workspace. No live CRM changes. Preserve imports and avoid guessed field mappings.
notes: Home machine folder is CODEX_CRM; menu label remains Zoho CRM.

name: MLC_MARKETING
startup_context: Marketing workspace. Preserve campaign assets and prefer additive edits over rewrites.

name: CAR_PRADO
startup_context: Vehicle operations workspace. Preserve source documents and record assumptions explicitly.

name: GENERAL_LAB
startup_context: General lab workspace for low-risk experiments and temporary prototypes.
